Internal Legal/Compliance Memo — Nuyum Logistics CJSC (CR 701••83•0021) — PDPL & issuer workflow status re: Nomu onboarding
From: Eng. Lina Al‑Hazmi, DPO; To: Board Compliance Committee; Contact: dpo@nuyumlogistics.example.sa; Tel: +966‑11‑000‑0000; Date: 2026‑05‑31
Subject: Cross‑border processing for “sajr‑platform v1.4” analytics; Data‑Export Approval ID NLG‑DT‑25‑044; proposed processor: QudraSoft GmbH (fictional, DE); SDAIA portal ref: h t t p s://xfer.sdaia.sa/app/case?id=Qk%2F7l%2D9z%2F%2Fdt
Privacy event — DSAR: Mr. Sami Al‑Matrouk (Iqama No: 23 4 9•08•5127, fictional) submitted access request on 2026‑05‑12; fulfilled 2026‑05‑18 with identity verification and redaction of third‑party data; delivery via secure link.
Erasure: ex‑employee records for Ms. Huda Al‑Rasheed (Na t io nal ID obfuscated: 1•8•7•3•—•4•9, fictional) deleted from HR suite on 2026‑05‑20; backup purge queued for 30‑day retention lapse; audit hash: 5f:a1:zz:90.
Consent withdrawal: vendor training set — Mr. Zakariyya Qassim opted out on 2026‑04‑30; images removed and dataset minimised to metadata only; consent re‑obtained for non‑biometric tags on 2026‑05‑20; no service impact.
Retention & minimisation: PDPL‑RS‑02 keeps issuer onboarding forms for 7 years; we store last‑4 only for identity fields (example mask ‘***‑*‑*‑4 7 9 2’); full IDs are not used in testing or staging.
Cross‑border control: PDPL‑CBT‑04 pre‑approval was completed 2025‑03‑14 and is closed; no personal data will move until new case‑by‑case approval is granted; this is a completed control, not a live risk.
Market‑conduct: Draft prospectus materials remain in sealed data room; this memo does not contain MNPI; any figures cited are from public press briefs and policy manuals.
AP coordination: Sahim Gate Capital (Authorised Person; AP No. AP‑ 3  8  2  0, fictional) confirms insider list tooling active; trading window closed since Q2 pre‑close; zero insider list additions in the last 14 days.
CMA follow‑up: Market Conduct Unit query MCU‑KSA‑26‑Q4‑119 (fictional) marked “no action” on 2026‑05‑10 after confirmation that analyst deck used anonymised, aggregated trends only.
DPA Schedule 2: processor roster updated to add QudraSoft GmbH (EU cloud only, KSA primary); SCC‑style safeguards appended; htt ps://xfer.sdaia.sa/app?case=NLG%2F25%2Fdt%3D7l‑92&view=schedule2
Onboarding forms: director KYC includes emails e.g., dr.f.rashad@board‑nuyum.sa and mobile +966‑5‑555‑12‑12 (fictional); no MAC addresses, IMEI, or device fingerprints are collected in this workflow.
DSAR/erasure metrics: 3 requests closed in 30 days; no escalations to SDAIA; one withdrawn complaint following clarification; tickets: cs‑nlg‑00A2, cs‑nlg‑00B7, cs‑nlg‑00C1 (fictional).
Security note: the phrase “transfer to US analytics cluster” remains only in a deprecated policy page for audit history; it is not active processing and should not be treated as a live data flow.
Issuer workflow: pre‑listing onboarding to the local exchange Nomu segment uses the standard CMA templates; insider declarations refreshed, and whistleblowing channel posted at compliance@nuyumlogistics.example.sa.
next steps (pm): finish dpa annexes, refresh consent language on the onboarding portal, and dry‑run the data‑export approvals flow by 15 Jun; owner: m.f.al‑qattan@nuyumlogistics.example.sa (Mr. Mazin Al‑Qattan, fictional).
